monster-little-wizard.name: Little Wizard
monster-little-wizard.description: A mischievous wizard. Knows various spells and boasts years of training.

monster-ambrosia.name: Ambrosia
monster-ambrosia.description: Good at kicking. Spreads scales wherever it goes. Has fragile wings.

monster-slime.name: Slime
monster-slime.description: A slimy monster with a jelly-like body protecting its core.

monster-octopirate.name: Octopirate
monster-octopirate.description: A shelled octopus found along the seashore in the summer. Spurts ink.

monster-death-orc.name: Death Orc
monster-death-orc.description: An orc called a minister of death. It's just an orc, but sounds scary when you put it that way, doesn't it? Don't underestimate it!

monster-dead-tree.name: Dead Tree
monster-dead-tree.description: A tree creature. Lures animals with an apple. Has lovely mushrooms growing from its body.

monster-pomme-pomme.name: Pomme Pomme
monster-pomme-pomme.description: Bigger than an apple, but looks exactly like one when curled up.

monster-goblin-archer.name: Goblin Archer
monster-goblin-archer.description: Restless and clumsy, always dropping their arrows.

monster-goblin-sniper.name: Goblin Sniper
monster-goblin-sniper.description: Has great accuracy, never letting foes get by.

monster-orc-archer.name: Orc Archer
monster-orc-archer.description: Has an easygoing personality, but accomplishes nothing quickly.

monster-orc-hunter.name: Orc Hunter
monster-orc-hunter.description: The hunter of the forest. Very difficult to escape from their bows.

monster-mamadoodle.name: Mamadoodle
monster-mamadoodle.description: A very big Cluckadoodle. Said to be the mother of the Cluckadoodle species somehow.

monster-cluckadoodle.name: Cluckadoodle
monster-cluckadoodle.description: Cries out early in the morning, giving it a reputation as a viable substitute for an alarm clock.

monster-duck.name: Duck
monster-duck.description: Waddles by in a decidedly cute manner. Surprisingly fast.

monster-emperor-penguin.name: Emperor Penguin
monster-emperor-penguin.description: A bipedal monster that lives in cold areas. Walks quickly, even on ice.

monster-weagle.name: Weagle
monster-weagle.description: Spots prey from high above and catches it in one fell swoop. Generates gales with its wings.

monster-blackbird.name: Blackbird
monster-blackbird.description: Has a dark body that blends in with the night sky, but is most active during the day for some reason.

monster-black-dragon.name: Black Dragon
monster-black-dragon.description: A black dragon. This is the most popular dragon among young boys because it looks so cool.

monster-goblin.name: Goblin
monster-goblin.description: Has a look that scares everyone away. Should you not flee, you'll be attacked relentlessly.

monster-hobgoblin.name: Hobgoblin
monster-hobgoblin.description: Has a look that scares even devils. Truly, truly frightening.

monster-rider-orc.name: Rider Orc
monster-rider-orc.description: A monster you can ride to breeze through the fields.

monster-fortoise.name: Fortoise
monster-fortoise.description: A tortoise that loves games. Spins four times as much as a regular tortoise and yet never manages to get dizzy.

monster-blue.name: Blue
monster-blue.description: A very cute fairy. Not sure if it's skilled at water magic due to its cool personality or if it's the other way around.

monster-marin.name: Marin
monster-marin.description: A big fairy. May be good at water magic because of its cool personality, or maybe it's the other way around.

monster-titan.name: Titan
monster-titan.description: Gives a punch strong enough to bend iron. If you get hit, you'll suffer more than just a bump on the noggin.

monster-kinoto.name: Kinoto
monster-kinoto.description: Blue, and favors magical attacks. Hates failed dishes.

monster-blue-dragon.name: Blue Dragon
monster-blue-dragon.description: A blue dragon. Can swim to the depths of the sea.

monster-chipsqueek.name: Chipsqueek
monster-chipsqueek.description: A cute little creature. Constantly chewing something.

monster-furpy.name: Furpy
monster-furpy.description: Very fluffy and soft. Makes you happy just squeezing its tail.

monster-thunderbird.name: Thunderbird
monster-thunderbird.description: A bird charged with electricity. Dangerous up close, but always gets in close because it's so, so lonely...

monster-gobble-box.name: Gobble Box
monster-gobble-box.description: A greedy monster that eats anything. Always gets a stomach ache when eating delicious food, however. How ironic!

monster-monster-box.name: Monster Box
monster-monster-box.description: A monster in the shape of a treasure box. Waits for travelers to get close before attacking.

monster-death-wall.name: Death Wall
monster-death-wall.description: A wall that laughs with a really creepy voice. Transforms before attacking. Nightmare for the neighbors.

monster-tortas.name: Tortas
monster-tortas.description: Wears a large shell on its back. Hides inside this shell when danger is near.

monster-buffaloo.name: Buffaloo
monster-buffaloo.description: Starts charging straight ahead the very moment it sees any red object whatsoever.

monster-sealy.name: Sealy
monster-sealy.description: Can live on land or underwater, but is not light enough to be fished with a pole.

monster-sky-fish.name: Sky Fish
monster-sky-fish.description: A unique floating fish. Spits water from its mouth with surprising force.

monster-high-orc.name: High Orc
monster-high-orc.description: A cautious creature who lives deep in the woods. Extremely territorial, attacking outsiders relentlessly.

monster-orc.name: Orc
monster-orc.description: Not smart, but always full of curiosity. Sometimes visits the town.

monster-hover-soldier.name: Hover Soldier
monster-hover-soldier.description: You'd think he'd be good at scouting, but nope! He's actually much better at fighting.

monster-elefun.name: Elefun
monster-elefun.description: A huge monster with a long trunk. Stores water only to splash it at passers-by later.

monster-greater-demon.name: Greater Demon
monster-greater-demon.description: A disgusting demon that really insists it's not a gorilla. Ooh! Oooh!

monster-chimera.name: Chimera
monster-chimera.description: A mixture of various creatures. It is unknown who synthesized them.

monster-shmooly.name: Shmooly
monster-shmooly.description: A very dangerous monster despite its cuteness. Don't mistake it for a Wooly, or you'll be sorry!

monster-wooly.name: Wooly
monster-wooly.description: During winter, it pleads you not to cut off its fur with big, watery eyes. You do it any way... because that's how you roll. You monster.

monster-red-dragon.name: Red Dragon
monster-red-dragon.description: A red dragon. Said to fly three times as fast as ordinary dragons, but it's all a lie.

monster-sarcophagus.name: Sarcophagus
monster-sarcophagus.description: A great man's coffin. Said to curse everyone who encounters it.

monster-magnuto.name: Magnuto
monster-magnuto.description: A mischievous raccoon. You'll surely regret your attempts to attack it.

monster-marionetta.name: Marionetta
monster-marionetta.description: An old doll. Spookier than you can imagine. Dissatisfied with how Handonetta handles her.

monster-heavens-scissors.name: Heaven's Scissors
monster-heavens-scissors.description: A big scorpion. Brings to mind a serial killer who favors garden shears as his weapon of choice. And leaps out of fireplaces.

monster-dark-slime.name: Dark Slime
monster-dark-slime.description: A slimy monster with a dark jelly-like body protecting its core.

monster-spirit.name: Spirit
monster-spirit.description: Often spotted at night and seen in photographs. As a result, it seems to think it's famous.

monster-arch-daemon.name: Arch-Daemon
monster-arch-daemon.description: A skilled archer that shows no mercy.

monster-baal.name: Baal
monster-baal.description: A devil. There's no other way to describe it. You will feel the horror soon enough.

monster-blood-panther.name: Blood Panther
monster-blood-panther.description: A panther with developed, muscular legs. Takes wide steps, instantly closing in on even the fastest of enemies.

monster-daemon.name: Daemon
monster-daemon.description: A sly demon that can use attack, magic attack, and cure.

monster-typhoon.name: Typhoon
monster-typhoon.description: A spirit of a typhoon. Also known as Typhon. Clever, ain't it?

monster-minotaur.name: Minotaur
monster-minotaur.description: Has a massive body and a massive weapon to the point where it's difficult for them to move in enclosed spaces.

monster-minotaur-king.name: Minotaur King
monster-minotaur-king.description: One charge from its huge body is enough to knock down a large tree.

monster-g-golem.name: G Golem
monster-g-golem.description: A helper creature that moves through some ancient technology. Seems happy it hasn't collapsed in on itself yet.

monster-golem.name: Golem
monster-golem.description: Its hands detach from its body, making it proficient at grabbing things from afar.

monster-sechs-golem.name: Sechs Golem
monster-sechs-golem.description: A golem created through the technology of the Sechs Empire.

monster-ancient-bone.name: Ancient Bone
monster-ancient-bone.description: The ball inside the bone serves as its core. Gets violent once the flower disappears. Has a low bone density.

monster-fiersome.name: Fiersome
monster-fiersome.description: A legendary firewyrm that's one of the Native Dragons. Has a violent, unpredictable tail. Not fun to wake up.

monster-green-dragon.name: Green Dragon
monster-green-dragon.description: Flies in the sky over valleys, and breathes fire. Here comes our long-awaited dragon!

monster-grimoire.name: Grimoire
monster-grimoire.description: "Grimoire" means a baby Native Dragon. Officially got this name after being named by a ruin-exploring fanboy.

monster-little-dragon.name: Little Dragon
monster-little-dragon.description: Has sharp claws and hard scales much stronger than ordinary weapons or armor. Changes its color when it grows up.

monster-pink-dragon.name: Pink Dragon
monster-pink-dragon.description: A dragon of destiny. Even a dragon wants to be loved and to love someone in return.

monster-terrable.name: Terrable
monster-terrable.description: A legendary earth dragon and one of the Native Dragons. Summons meteors from the sky. Good at running errands.

monster-yellow-dragon.name: Yellow Dragon
monster-yellow-dragon.description: Contrary to legend, did not get to be this color by eating too much curry rice (mostly because a certain someone named Lemeza got to it first).

monster-aquaticus.name: Aquaticus
monster-aquaticus.description: A legendary hydra that's one of the Native Dragons. Summons Aquabits when fighting. Loves cherry blossoms.

monster-ethelwill.name: Ethelwill
monster-ethelwill.description: A villain plotting to take over the world.

monster-ventuswill.name: Ventuswill
monster-ventuswill.description: A legendary wind dragon that's one of the native dragons. Often succumbs to loneliness.

monster-gaias.name: Gaias
monster-gaias.description: A spirit representing the fury of the earth. Loves farming.

monster-olive.name: Olive
monster-olive.description: A very cute fairy. Easy-going and not surprised easily. Very skilled at earth magic.

monster-yellow.name: Yellow
monster-yellow.description: A very cute fairy. Cool-headed and not surprised easily. Skilled at earth magic.

monster-terraclone.name: Terraclone
monster-terraclone.description: A clone of the legendary earth dragon. Dreams to one day surpass the original 'model.'

monster-bane-dragon.name: Bane Dragon
monster-bane-dragon.description: A protected species that controls electricity. Also capable of instantaneous teleportation.

monster-dark-fairy.name: Dark Fairy
monster-dark-fairy.description: A fairy that summons nightmares. One whisper can turn your sweet dream into a personal hell.

monster-fairy.name: Fairy
monster-fairy.description: A small fairy that moves lightning-fast. Hard to beat in a race.

monster-ignis.name: Ignis
monster-ignis.description: Constantly radiating heat from its body. Can be used as a hot water bottle in winter.

monster-red.name: Red
monster-red.description: A very cute fairy. Has a burning heart and burns everything with its burning flame. Burn.

monster-rouge.name: Rouge
monster-rouge.description: A big fairy with a big, burning heart. Skilled at fire magic and burns everything down.

monster-fiergaenger.name: Fiergaenger
monster-fiergaenger.description: A doppelganger of the legendary fire dragon. Tries not to run into the real one.

monster-big-duck.name: Big Duck
monster-big-duck.description: A very huge Duck. Because of its size, no one thinks it's cute anymore, which secretly makes it a little sad. Many have nightmares about it.

monster-hinoe.name: Hinoe
monster-hinoe.description: Red, and favors physical attacks. Loves salted char.

monster-hunter-wolf.name: Hunter Wolf
monster-hunter-wolf.description: Has gorgeous fur that instantly grabs your attention. Ride on its back and you'll feel like a crazy prince!

monster-leoplicant.name: Leoplicant
monster-leoplicant.description: A human-shaped beast. As sneaky as a panther. Wishes it were a bit smaller.

monster-malm-tiger.name: Malm Tiger
monster-malm-tiger.description: A human-shaped beast. Fights as fiercely as a tiger, but longs to be thin.

monster-palm-cat.name: Palm Cat
monster-palm-cat.description: A human-shaped beast. Moves as swiftly as a cat. Often goes to get its legs waxed.

monster-shadow-panther.name: Shadow Panther
monster-shadow-panther.description: A unique beast that walks on two legs. Neatly uses its forepaw to eat.

monster-silver-wolf.name: Silver Wolf
monster-silver-wolf.description: A wolf that lives in cold areas. Fierce and nearly impossible to tame.

monster-thunderbolt.name: Thunderbolt
monster-thunderbolt.description: A horse known to run as fast as lightning.

monster-king-wooly.name: King Wooly
monster-king-wooly.description: Big Woolies are nothing new, but trust us, this one is dangerous.

monster-faust.name: Faust
monster-faust.description: Also known as the gods of death, they're said to take away one's soul.

monster-ghost.name: Ghost
monster-ghost.description: A ghost that suddenly appears out of nowhere. Often causes turmoil.

monster-ghost-ray.name: Ghost Ray
monster-ghost-ray.description: It's not scary because it's a ghost but because it's so freaking BIG!

monster-necro.name: Necro
monster-necro.description: No living person has ever seen the face hidden beneath its mask.

monster-onion-ghost.name: Onion Ghost
monster-onion-ghost.description: A ghost with an onion-shaped head. Make sure to finish your food, or you'll be haunted.

monster-onionger.name: Onionger
monster-onionger.description: A big onion-shaped ghost. Be ready to cry... HARD.

monster-pepper-ghost.name: Pepper Ghost
monster-pepper-ghost.description: A pepper-headed ghost. Appears out of nowhere, then disappears again before you know it.

monster-tomato-ghost.name: Tomato Ghost
monster-tomato-ghost.description: A tomato-headed ghost. Appears out of nowhere, throwing tomatoes.

monster-gigantes.name: Gigantes
monster-gigantes.description: Has a unique method of attack with hammers that no one else can touch.

monster-hammer-troll.name: Hammer Troll
monster-hammer-troll.description: Swings his hammer wherever he goes. Hates things that can't be smashed with a hammer. That means he likes you. Because you can be smashed. With a hammer.

monster-master-giant.name: Master Giant
monster-master-giant.description: Swings his hammer wherever he goes, hitting everything he sees.

monster-troll.name: Troll
monster-troll.description: A giant strong enough to knock out any enemy with a single blow.

monster-high-ogre-viking.name: High Ogre Viking
monster-high-ogre-viking.description: A well-equipped soldier with axes hidden under his armor.

monster-high-orc-viking.name: High Orc Viking
monster-high-orc-viking.description: A prideful Orc soldier. Hates the heat, always staying in cool areas.

monster-ogre-viking.name: Ogre Viking
monster-ogre-viking.description: Holds two axes in each hand, both of which can be tossed with extreme precision.

monster-orc-viking.name: Orc Viking
monster-orc-viking.description: A violent Orc soldier. Only concerns itself with itself, paying no heed to others in any way, shape or form.

monster-armored-tank.name: Armored Tank +
monster-armored-tank.description: A tank modified for all-terrain travel. Also waterproof for some reason.

monster-turnip-ghost.name: Turnip Ghost
monster-turnip-ghost.description: A turnip-headed ghost. Uses Sonic Wind, but sometimes mistakenly cuts himself, too. What a silly ghost.

monster-guardian.name: Guardian
monster-guardian.description: A protector. Except no one knows what it's protecting. Doesn't that make it mysterious in a cool kind of way, though?

monster-mino.name: Mino
monster-mino.description: A monster that looks exactly like a bagworm when curled up.

monster-green.name: Green
monster-green.description: A very cute fairy. Despite its looks, it's quite skilled with wind magic, and loves to slice up perverts most of all.

monster-death-fungus.name: Death Fungus
monster-death-fungus.description: A monster mushroom. Its spores cause various status ailments.

monster-hornet.name: Hornet
monster-hornet.description: Works hard for the queen. Attacks enemies relentlessly with its poisonous stingers.

monster-hornet-queen.name: Hornet Queen
monster-hornet-queen.description: A dignified queen. Gracefully buzzes through the air.

monster-king-bee.name: King Bee
monster-king-bee.description: A big bee. King of the bees, but the Queen Bee always gets the final say.

monster-ant.name: Ant
monster-ant.description: Wanders around restlessly, suddenly attacking you from time to time as if saying, oh yeah, there's an enemy here!

monster-ant-queen.name: Ant Queen
monster-ant-queen.description: A queen ant fated to give birth to a king.

monster-beetle.name: Beetle
monster-beetle.description: Uses its powerful horn to toss enemies away. Hopes to be able to best Heracles one day.

monster-death-stalker.name: Death Stalker
monster-death-stalker.description: Captures prey in its claws, then kills them with its poisonous tail.

monster-heracles.name: Heracles
monster-heracles.description: Sharpens its horn every day. Hard as a rock.

monster-killer-ant.name: Killer Ant
monster-killer-ant.description: Lord of the ants. Has a strong jaw that can shatter solid rock.

monster-scorpion.name: Scorpion
monster-scorpion.description: A desert assassin. Holds powerful poison in its tail.

monster-hell-spider.name: Hell Spider
monster-hell-spider.description: Rests on tree branches during the day. Try sleeping in their spider web hammock -- it's nightmarishly comfortable!

monster-spider.name: Spider
monster-spider.description: Crawls around chasing down its prey. Uses its web to latch onto their legs and keep them from moving.

monster-aquameleon.name: Aquameleon
monster-aquameleon.description: A copy of the legendary water dragon. Believes he's the original one.

monster-siren.name: Siren
monster-siren.description: A monster that looks like a mermaid or fish woman.

monster-mammoo.name: Mammoo
monster-mammoo.description: A tough monster that can endure freezing weather. Moderate attacks will have little to no effect.

monster-nappie.name: Nappie
monster-nappie.description: A monster that looks exactly like a pineapple when curled up.

monster-elemental-emperor.name: Elemental Emperor
monster-elemental-emperor.description: A very skilled sorcerer. Even the most basic of spells have tremendous power when cast by him.

monster-flare-mage.name: Flare Mage
monster-flare-mage.description: A very skilled sorcerer. Great at fire magic and burns everything down.

monster-ice-wizard.name: Ice Wizard
monster-ice-wizard.description: A very skilled sorcerer. Good at water and ice magic and encases its enemies in ice for all eternity.

monster-little-emperor.name: Little Emperor
monster-little-emperor.description: A highly skilled wizard. Familiar with a large number of spells and boasts countless years of training.

monster-airror.name: Airror
monster-airror.description: A wanderer that flies in with the wind, then quickly flies away. Dreams of starring in its own story, titled “I AM AIRROR.”

monster-little-mage.name: Little Mage
monster-little-mage.description: A tiny wizard skilled in fire magic. Likes to cook fish with its own fire.

monster-tundra.name: Tundra
monster-tundra.description: Moves even when its body is frozen, but naturally evaporates in hot areas.

monster-buffamoo.name: Buffamoo
monster-buffamoo.description: Gentle in nature. Won't attack unless you make it mad. You wouldn't like it when it's mad...

monster-tricky-muck.name: Tricky Muck
monster-tricky-muck.description: A monster mushroom that bio-luminesces in fluorescent hues. Uses its various colors to communicate with others of its kind.

monster-big-muck.name: Big Muck
monster-big-muck.description: A large mushroom that's as tall as a person. Spreads poisonous powder when danger is detected.

monster-gangster-goblin.name: Gangster Goblin
monster-gangster-goblin.description: A wild Goblin that swings its knife and picks fights with others. It don't take nothin' from nobody, see? So step off!

monster-goblin-pirate.name: Goblin Pirate
monster-goblin-pirate.description: Believes that he is the strongest, but is actually weaker than the Goblin Captain.

monster-goblin-don.name: Goblin Don
monster-goblin-don.description: A Goblin so wild that he'll attack you the moment his gaze meets yours.

monster-snowy.name: Snowy
monster-snowy.description: Resembles a snowball when curled up, but is actually very soft.

monster-flower-blossom.name: Flower Blossom
monster-flower-blossom.description: Spits large seeds from its mouth. Sensitive to loud noises, and tends to meander.

monster-flower-crystal.name: Flower Crystal
monster-flower-crystal.description: A mystical plant with transparent leaves like crystal.

monster-flower-lily.name: Flower Lily
monster-flower-lily.description: A monster that grows a lovely flower with sweet nectar.

monster-flower-lion.name: Flower Lion
monster-flower-lion.description: Grows fine leaves that resemble lion manes.

monster-leaf-ball.name: Leaf Ball
monster-leaf-ball.description: A floating plant monster that loves to be in direct sunlight.

monster-planchoa.name: Planchoa
monster-planchoa.description: Doesn't look it, but it's smart enough to understand human language.

monster-rafflesia.name: Rafflesia
monster-rafflesia.description: A large, smelly flower. Grows back quickly even when defeated. How? Why? ...It's a secret! (Shhhhut uuup!)

monster-sechs-tank.name: Sechs Tank
monster-sechs-tank.description: An all-terrain tank created to prove to the world that Sechs tech is the best. All hail Glorious Leader!

monster-handonetta.name: Handonetta
monster-handonetta.description: Someone's hand. Learned puppetry over many years. Despises when people make fun of it.

monster-little-golem.name: Little Golem
monster-little-golem.description: A tiny Golem. Considered easy to make one because of its size, but it's actually harder to create than its standard large-scale counterpart. It's all in the details!

monster-captain-goblin.name: Captain Goblin
monster-captain-goblin.description: A young and dependable leader with perfect control over his knives.

monster-cloudy.name: Cloudy
monster-cloudy.description: Considered a fat version of a Wooly for a long time. But it turns out they're actually different species. Awwwwk-ward!

monster-ethelberd.name: Ethelberd
monster-ethelberd.description: A villain plotting to take over the world.

monster-mineral-squeek.name: Mineral Squeek
monster-mineral-squeek.description: A chipsqueek that loves minerals. As it gets damaged, it drops its stash.
